backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing content sections, quiz questions, and printable guides with query methods for retrieval and quiz scoring.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping new spider-related UI and content additions to affected files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of concise summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base theme definitions with OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component wiring QueryClientProvider and rendering header, content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Tabbed educational interface handling pest selection and showing scanner, sections, quizzes, guides, and species-specific content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with attribution, copyright, and a brief safety disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with app branding and a bug icon, styled with Tailwind.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: Shows educational content about cockroach identification, species, and infestation signs.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: Renders educational content about identifying, checking for, and understanding the spread of head lice using alerts and structured card sections.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Provides guidance on identifying mice, signs of infestation, and common nesting habits through alerts and informational cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Displays safety warnings and detailed information on identifying scorpions, their habitats, and behavior.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: Shows safety guidance and descriptions of common spider species, signs of their presence, and indoor habitats.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Provides a full photo scanning workflow with camera capture, image editing, saving, tagging, and exporting.
Fetches and displays printable PDF guides for a quiz section, with loading states and download functionality.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Loads quiz questions for a section and manages answering, feedback, progress, scoring, and quiz completion flow.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Displays saved scans with filtering, tag management, reordering, and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Allows adding, editing, and removing tags on a saved scan using inline tag editing UI.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Explains bed bug hiding spots, feeding behavior, and lifecycle using images and descriptive card sections.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Implements a safety reminder dialog for heat treatment, emphasizing critical precautions and handling user confirmation or cancellation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Renders educational UI cards and alerts explaining how to identify bed bugs with images and descriptive text. Provides sections for adult bugs, life stages, and bite marks.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Displays prevention tips using cards and alerts covering travel precautions and used-item safety with supporting images. Focuses on helping users avoid bringing bed bugs home.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Implements a heat‑treatment checklist with phases, progress tracking, reminder gating, and UI components. Integrates hooks to manage checklist completion and reminder state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on authentication state using react‑query. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Manages checklist progress in localStorage, providing toggle, reset, and completion‑stats helpers. Tracks loaded state and persists updates automatically.
Tracks whether a heat‑treatment reminder has been acknowledged, storing confirmation in localStorage. Controls reminder dialog visibility with confirm, cancel, and show methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Handles client‑side image processing including rotation, zoom, enhancement, and exporting. Manages processed state and debounces processing using a ref.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, exposing identity, login, logout, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quiz questions, quiz results, and printable guides through an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Manages saved image scans in localStorage with support for creation, deletion, reordering, and tag management.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and defines theme color variables for light and dark mode plus utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Implements client-side image transformations including rotation, enhancement, zoom, and cropping.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, themes, animations, and plugins including typography and container queries.
project_state.json: JSON describing the project’s current state, app purpose, required images, and a list of existing features with versions and requirement IDs.
